jd.jd_summary: Seeking a Generative AI Full-Stack Engineer to build an end-to-end AI recruitment platform, handling everything from frontend development to AI processing pipelines.
core_responsibilities: Create FastAPI web services for backend
Implement AI processing pipelines using Python
Integrate external APIs for enhanced functionality
must_haves_from_jd: Bachelor's in CS, Software Engineering, AI, or related field
Knowledge of Supabase, PostgreSQL, and pgvector
DevOps experience including Git and REST API design
nice_to_haves_from_jd: Familiarity with MCP or AI agent frameworks

compliance_requirements: Bachelor's in CS, Software Engineering, AI, or related field

must_have.requirement: Bachelor's in CS, Software Engineering, AI, or related field
evidence_signals: Degree in relevant field mentioned in CV
Relevant coursework or projects in AI or software engineering
Graduation date aligns with experience timeline
Demonstrated projects in CV showcasing GenAI/RAG systems
Specific roles held in previous employment related to GenAI
References confirming experience in relevant technologies
negative_signals: No relevant projects or roles listed

evidence_signals: Projects listed in CV using Python and React
Contributions to open-source projects in these languages
Certifications or courses completed in Python/React
Projects or roles specifically mentioning FastAPI and React.js
Demonstrated ability to build applications using these frameworks
Technical blogs or articles authored on these technologies
negative_signals: No experience with FastAPI or React.js

must_have.requirement: Knowledge of Supabase, PostgreSQL, and pgvector
evidence_signals: Experience listed in CV with database technologies
Projects utilizing Supabase or PostgreSQL
Understanding of vector storage concepts
negative_signals: Experience only with unrelated database systems

evidence_signals: Specific projects demonstrating RAG implementation
Experience with chunking and embeddings
Knowledge of vector search techniques
negative_signals: Only theoretical knowledge without practical application

must_have.requirement: DevOps experience including Git and REST API design
evidence_signals: Experience with version control systems in CV
Projects involving REST API design
Knowledge of deployment processes
Experience integrating APIs in previous roles
Projects showcasing successful API integrations
Technical documentation or case studies authored

nice_to_have.skill: Familiarity with MCP or AI agent frameworks

bias_guardrails.enforcement: Strip protected attributes prior to scoring

sections: Role fit summary (overall score and hire/no-hire recommendation)
Must-have requirements score breakdown (with evidence quotes/snippets from CV)
Gaps and risks (what is missing or unclear)
Suggested interview questions to validate gaps
Implementation notes / context (if any scoring relaxations apply)
output_constraints: Do not consider or mention protected attributes.
Every score claim must be supported by explicit CV evidence; otherwise mark as 'Not demonstrated'.
Keep output within 1-2 pages; use bullet points and concise justification.
If any must-have scores below 2, mark overall result as FAIL regardless of weighted score.
